muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
muxt check

exec go test -race -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /render Render(execute)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
{{- define "GET /events sse(Stream(ctx, send))" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.24
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

// RenderInt is a named func type used as the execute callback.
type RenderInt func(int) error

// EmitString is an aliased func type used as the send callback.
type EmitString = func(string) error

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Render(execute RenderInt) error { return execute(7) }

func (Server) Stream(ctx context.Context, send EmitString) { _ = send("hi") }
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func get(t *testing.T, mux *http.ServeMux, path string) string {
	t.Helper()
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, path, nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	return rec.Body.String()
}

func TestNamedFuncCallbacks(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})

	if got := get(t, mux, "/render"); !strings.Contains(got, "<p>7</p>") {
		t.Fatalf("execute (named RenderInt) body = %q, want <p>7</p>", got)
	}
	if got := get(t, mux, "/events"); !strings.Contains(got, "data: hi\n\n") {
		t.Fatalf("send (aliased EmitString) body = %q, want data: hi frame", got)
	}
}
